body.head: Testing Alternate Behaviors
body.p: This is a test document with various choice elements for demonstrating alternate content switching.

div.head: Sic/Corr Examples (Spelling Correction)
div.p: The manuscript reads recieve receive which is clearly a spelling error.
Another example: the text says occured occurred in the original.

div.head: Abbr/Expan Examples (Abbreviation Expansion)
div.p: The document contains many abbreviations like Mr. Mister and etc. etcetera throughout.
Scientific texts often use vol. volume to save space.

div.head: Orig/Reg Examples (Regularization)
div.p: Early modern texts often have variant spellings like ye the or honour honor which are modernized versions.
The older form connexion connection was commonly used in the 18th century.

div.head: Mixed Content
div.p: This paragraph contains recieved received and also mentions Prof. Professor Smith who published his connexions connections to the research.
